name: Employee Asset Tracking Module
description: A custom Business Central extension designed to help organisations manage asset lifecycle processes within the ERP environment, combining business workflow thinking with practical AL implementation.
businessImpact: Improved operational visibility for asset ownership, status tracking, and lifecycle reporting in a business-ready ERP extension.
features: Custom tables, pages, and workflows to support asset tracking end-to-end
Assignment logic linking employees to equipment with status and date tracking
Asset lifecycle management for available, assigned, repair, and retired states
RDLC reporting for inventory visibility and employee-wise asset statements
Designed to fit naturally into Business Central navigation and security models

name: Online Examination Portal
description: A full-featured web-based examination system built in PHP that allows administrators to create and manage online tests while students take timed assessments from any browser — no installation required.
features: Admin panel to create, edit, and schedule exams with question banks
Timed exam interface with auto-submit on session expiry
Instant result generation with score summary and answer review
Role-based access for admins and students with secure login
MySQL-backed storage for questions, responses, and result history

name: Travel Blog
description: A dynamic travel blogging platform built with PHP where authors can publish destination stories, travel guides, and photo-rich articles — complete with a content management backend and reader-facing frontend.
features: Custom CMS for creating, editing, and publishing blog posts
Category and tag-based filtering for destinations and trip types
Responsive, image-forward layout optimised for storytelling
Comment system and post search functionality
Admin dashboard with post and user management

name: JSON Testimonial Widget
description: A lightweight, zero-dependency testimonial component that reads reviewer data from a JSON source and renders it as a sleek, animated carousel — easily embeddable into any website without a backend.
features: JSON-driven content — add or update testimonials without touching the code
Smooth auto-rotating carousel with manual navigation controls
Star rating display, reviewer name, role, and avatar support
Fully responsive and keyboard-accessible
Pure vanilla JS — no frameworks or external dependencies
